label: Alerts Flow
info: LoRa message parsing, threshold checking, alert generation

name: Parse Binary to JSON
Build DB Queries
func:
const payload = msg.payload;
if (!payload || !payload.nodeId) return null;
if (payload.error) return null;

msg.nodeId = payload.nodeId;
msg.sensorData = payload;

msg.query = `
    WITH updated AS (
        UPDATE devices SET last_seen = NOW() WHERE node_id = $1
        RETURNING id, node_id, display_name, owner_id
    )
    SELECT
        d.id as device_id,
        d.display_name,
        o.name as owner_name,
        o.email as owner_email,
        o.phone as owner_phone,
        o.notify_via,
        json_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object(
            'pin_index', dp.pin_index,
            'label', dp.label,
            'trigger', dp.trigger,
            'alert_level', dp.alert_level
        )) FILTER (WHERE dp.label != '' AND dp.trigger != 'None') as digital_pins,
        json_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object(
            'pin_index', ap.pin_index,
            'label', ap.label,
            'low_threshold', ap.low_threshold,
            'high_threshold', ap.high_threshold,
            'alert_level', ap.alert_level
        )) FILTER (WHERE ap.label != '' AND ap.alert_level != 'None') as analog_pins
    FROM updated d
    LEFT JOIN owners o ON d.owner_id = o.id
    LEFT JOIN digital_pins dp ON dp.device_id = d.id
    LEFT JOIN analog_pins ap ON ap.device_id = d.id
    GROUP BY d.id, d.display_name, o.name, o.email, o.phone, o.notify_via
`;
msg.params = [payload.nodeId];

return msg;

name: Check Thresholds
Send Notification
Auto-Register Device
Build New Device Notification
